calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing To Submit Proof And Request Amendment To Unlawful Detainer Default Judgment For Money Damages
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Benly Wong, individually and dba J&J Tires LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Thomas E. Foran, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Steve Chan, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by respondent Benly Wong, individually and dba J&J Tires LLC.
Plaintiff's Unlawful Detainer Complaint was filed on September 15, 2017.
Order to Post and Mail Summons, Complaint and Pre-Judgment Claim of Right to Possession was filed on September 29, 2017.
Proof of Service of Summons, Complaint and Pre-Judgment Claim of Right to Possession was filed on October 20, 2017.
Default as to defendant Benly Wong, individually and dba J&J Tires LLC, was enterd on October 20, 2017.
Clerk's Judgment for Possession of the premises located at 955 Folsom Street, San Francisco, CA 94107 was entered on October 24, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 7, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Steven Chan, and against the Defaulted Defendant Benly Wong, individually and dba J&J Tires LLC, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $29,000.00.
Holdover Damages - $10,800.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,825.00.
Costs - $894.65.

Total - $44,519.65.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Hearing To Submit Proof And Request Amendment To Unlawful Detainer Default Judgment For Money Damages
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To Apr-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
